title: Inside a Mine in India, Scientists Unearth 15-Meter-Long Snake Fossil, Rivalling Titanoboa in Size
description: For years, Titanoboa held the title of the largest snake to ever exist, but new evidence suggests there might be an even bigger contender.

title: From ancient goddesses to modern peace activists -- Mother's Day celebrates women's political power
description: OPINION -- On Mother's Day, Americans go all out with gift-buying and dining out to honor the women in their lives. In fact, according to some estimates, consumer spending in the United States on this day is around $34 billion.

title: Giant sinkholes discovered containing untouched ancient forests
description: Most of us associate sinkholes with frightening abysses, but in China, they’re considered “heavenly” for good reason.Far from being mouths of doom, a number of these have been discovered containing pristine ancient forests.Most recently, in August 2024, cave explorers stumbled upon one of these gian...

title: Trevor Hancock: Why are our political leaders such fossil fools?
description: Don’t they read the science? Or do they simply choose to ignore it because it doesn’t fit their short-term, market-oriented agenda?

title: This ancient New Testament manuscript was covered in “ghost text.” Now, scientists have recovered its lost words
description: Researchers have reunited fragments of a sixth-century Greek manuscript, revealing ‘ghost’ text and new evidence for how early Christian scripture was read, understood and preserved
